name: Intel Corporation
summary: CPU 业务提供现金流，Intel Foundry 与先进制程/封装决定中长期弹性，当前重点是供给、良率和外部客户。

business.description: Intel 设计并制造半导体，业务包括 Client Computing Group、Data Center and AI、Intel Foundry 以及其他业务。它既销售自有 CPU/平台产品，也试图把制程、晶圆制造、先进封装和测试能力作为外部 foundry 服务输出。
revenueModel: 数据中心 CPU 与平台

segments.name: Client Computing Group
segments.note: PC 与客户端平台是当前最重要收入来源之一。
segments.noteZh: PC 与客户端平台是当前最重要收入来源之一。
segments.noteEn: PC 与客户端平台是当前最重要收入来源之一。

segments.name: Data Center and AI
segments.note: 受 Xeon、AI 基础设施主机 CPU 和云/企业需求驱动。
segments.noteZh: 受 Xeon、AI 基础设施主机 CPU 和云/企业需求驱动。
segments.noteEn: 受 Xeon、AI 基础设施主机 CPU 和云/企业需求驱动。

segments.name: Intel Foundry
segments.note: 含内部交易，不能与总净收入直接相加；是中长期战略弹性来源。
segments.noteZh: 含内部交易，不能与总净收入直接相加；是中长期战略弹性来源。
segments.noteEn: 含内部交易，不能与总净收入直接相加；是中长期战略弹性来源。

business.thesis: Intel 的看点在于 CPU 基本盘、供给改善、Intel 18A/后续节点、先进封装和外部 foundry 客户能否同时兑现。若良率、成本和客户导入进展同步改善，估值弹性来自 foundry；若资本开支与折旧压力过大，则利润修复会受限。
riskNotes: Intel Foundry 收入包含内部交易，观察时需要区分总净收入与分部口径。
先进制程和 EUV 工具资本开支高，良率爬坡和折旧会影响毛利。
PC 与数据中心 CPU 面临 AMD、Arm、自研 ASIC 和 GPU 加速架构竞争。

failureConditions.condition: Intel Foundry 收入包含内部交易，观察时需要区分总净收入与分部口径。
failureConditions.conditionZh: Intel Foundry 收入包含内部交易，观察时需要区分总净收入与分部口径。
failureConditions.conditionEn: The thesis weakens if filings, announcements, or operating data show this risk is not affecting orders, margins, capacity, or customer adoption.
failureConditions.monitor: 持续跟踪公告、财报、订单/客户披露、毛利率、现金流和产能扩张节奏。
failureConditions.monitorZh: 持续跟踪公告、财报、订单/客户披露、毛利率、现金流和产能扩张节奏。
failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor filings, announcements, customer disclosures, margin trend, cash-flow conversion, and capacity expansion timing.

failureConditions.condition: 先进制程和 EUV 工具资本开支高，良率爬坡和折旧会影响毛利。

failureConditions.condition: PC 与数据中心 CPU 面临 AMD、Arm、自研 ASIC 和 GPU 加速架构竞争。

supplyChain.thesis: Intel 是 IDM 与 foundry 混合模式，供应链不仅包括上游材料和设备，也包括内部晶圆厂、封装测试基地和部分外部代工。上溯到原材料后，EUV 光刻、沉积/刻蚀/量测设备、高纯晶圆、特种气体、化学品、光刻胶和先进封装基板是关键约束。

tiers.title: 产品设计、制造和 foundry 服务

entities.name: Intel
entities.relationship: 目标企业本体；既设计 CPU/AI PC/数据中心芯片，也运营自有晶圆厂、封装测试基地，并向外部客户推进 foundry 服务。
entities.relationshipZh: 目标企业本体；既设计 CPU/AI PC/数据中心芯片，也运营自有晶圆厂、封装测试基地，并向外部客户推进 foundry 服务。
entities.relationshipEn: Intel is tracked in the Product design, manufacturing, and foundry services layer for CPU designs, Foundry services, Advanced packaging. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 目标公司
relationshipStrength.rationale: 目标公司本身，是本页产业链分析的参照对象。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 目标公司本身，是本页产业链分析的参照对象。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: The target company itself, used as the reference point for this supply-chain analysis.

tiers.notes: Intel 年报披露 2025 年主要封装测试设施在中国、新墨西哥、越南和马来西亚，新墨西哥是关键先进封装设施，马来西亚有新先进封装设施在建设。
tiers.titleZh: 产品设计、制造和 foundry 服务
tiers.titleEn: Product design, manufacturing, and foundry services
tiers.notesZh: Intel 年报披露 2025 年主要封装测试设施在中国、新墨西哥、越南和马来西亚，新墨西哥是关键先进封装设施，马来西亚有新先进封装设施在建设。
tiers.notesEn: Intel 年报披露 2025 年主要封装测试设施在中国、新墨西哥、越南和马来西亚，新墨西哥是关键先进封装设施，马来西亚有新先进封装设施在建设。

tiers.title: 晶圆厂设备与工艺工具

entities.name: ASML
entities.relationship: Intel 年报明确提到先进节点需要 ASML EUV 工具；ASML 是 Intel 先进制程扩产和良率爬坡的关键设备供应商。
entities.relationshipZh: Intel 年报明确提到先进节点需要 ASML EUV 工具；ASML 是 Intel 先进制程扩产和良率爬坡的关键设备供应商。
entities.relationshipEn: ASML is tracked in the Fab equipment and process tools layer for EUV lithography systems, DUV lithography systems, Lithography services. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Directly enters critical manufacturing, memory, or packaging layers, strongly affecting capacity, yield, and delivery cadence.

entities.name: Applied Materials
entities.relationship: 向 Intel 和同类晶圆厂提供材料工程、沉积和工艺设备；关系重点是先进节点资本开支、设备交期和产能安装。
entities.relationshipZh: 向 Intel 和同类晶圆厂提供材料工程、沉积和工艺设备；关系重点是先进节点资本开支、设备交期和产能安装。
entities.relationshipEn: Applied Materials is tracked in the Fab equipment and process tools layer for Deposition tools, Materials engineering, Process equipment. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Directly enters critical manufacturing, memory, or packaging layers, strongly affecting capacity, yield, and delivery cadence.

entities.name: Lam Research
entities.relationship: 为晶圆厂提供刻蚀、沉积和清洗设备；对 Intel 的关系主要是前道制程设备供应和先进节点良率支撑。
entities.relationshipZh: 为晶圆厂提供刻蚀、沉积和清洗设备；对 Intel 的关系主要是前道制程设备供应和先进节点良率支撑。
entities.relationshipEn: Lam Research is tracked in the Fab equipment and process tools layer for Etch tools, Deposition tools, Wafer cleaning equipment. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Directly enters critical manufacturing, memory, or packaging layers, strongly affecting capacity, yield, and delivery cadence.

entities.name: Tokyo Electron
entities.relationship: 半导体前道设备供应商，服务 Intel 及全球晶圆制造生态；关系集中在涂布显影、沉积、刻蚀等工艺设备。
entities.relationshipZh: 半导体前道设备供应商，服务 Intel 及全球晶圆制造生态；关系集中在涂布显影、沉积、刻蚀等工艺设备。
entities.relationshipEn: Tokyo Electron is tracked in the Fab equipment and process tools layer for Coater/developer tools, Deposition equipment, Etch systems. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Directly enters critical manufacturing, memory, or packaging layers, strongly affecting capacity, yield, and delivery cadence.

entities.name: KLA
entities.relationship: 检测、量测和过程控制设备供应商；Intel 先进节点爬坡需要通过这类设备降低缺陷并提升良率。
entities.relationshipZh: 检测、量测和过程控制设备供应商；Intel 先进节点爬坡需要通过这类设备降低缺陷并提升良率。
entities.relationshipEn: KLA is tracked in the Fab equipment and process tools layer for Inspection tools, Metrology systems, Process control. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Directly enters critical manufacturing, memory, or packaging layers, strongly affecting capacity, yield, and delivery cadence.

tiers.notes: Intel 年报明确提到先进制程所需的 ASML EUV 工具；其他设备商为半导体制造通用关键环节，具体采购比例未逐项披露。
tiers.titleZh: 晶圆厂设备与工艺工具
tiers.notesZh: Intel 年报明确提到先进制程所需的 ASML EUV 工具；其他设备商为半导体制造通用关键环节，具体采购比例未逐项披露。
tiers.notesEn: Intel 年报明确提到先进制程所需的 ASML EUV 工具；其他设备商为半导体制造通用关键环节，具体采购比例未逐项披露。

tiers.title: 外部 foundry、封装与基板

entities.name: TSMC
entities.relationship: Intel 部分产品和 chiplet 可能使用外部 foundry；TSMC 是先进外部代工产能的核心变量，但具体产品和比例需以 Intel 后续披露为准。
entities.relationshipZh: Intel 部分产品和 chiplet 可能使用外部 foundry；TSMC 是先进外部代工产能的核心变量，但具体产品和比例需以 Intel 后续披露为准。
entities.relationshipEn: TSMC is tracked in the External foundry, packaging, and substrates layer for External foundry wafers, Advanced process capacity, Chiplet manufacturing. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Directly enters critical manufacturing, memory, or packaging layers, strongly affecting capacity, yield, and delivery cadence.

entities.name: ASE Technology
entities.relationship: 外部 OSAT 和先进封装测试生态参与者；对 Intel 的意义是封装/测试产能弹性和供应链备份，而非所有产品的直接供应商。
entities.relationshipZh: 外部 OSAT 和先进封装测试生态参与者；对 Intel 的意义是封装/测试产能弹性和供应链备份，而非所有产品的直接供应商。
entities.relationshipEn: ASE Technology is tracked in the External foundry, packaging, and substrates layer for OSAT services, Advanced packaging, Semiconductor test. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Directly enters critical manufacturing, memory, or packaging layers, strongly affecting capacity, yield, and delivery cadence.

entities.name: Amkor
entities.relationship: 封装测试服务商；与 Intel 的关系主要是外部封测生态和先进封装产能备选，用于追踪供应弹性。
entities.relationshipZh: 封装测试服务商；与 Intel 的关系主要是外部封测生态和先进封装产能备选，用于追踪供应弹性。
entities.relationshipEn: Amkor is tracked in the External foundry, packaging, and substrates layer for Semiconductor packaging, Test services, Advanced packages. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。

relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Directly enters critical manufacturing, memory, or packaging layers, strongly affecting capacity, yield, and delivery cadence.

entities.name: Ibiden
entities.relationship: 封装基板供应商，处于 Intel 先进封装和高性能 CPU/GPU 封装的上游材料层。
entities.relationshipZh: 封装基板供应商，处于 Intel 先进封装和高性能 CPU/GPU 封装的上游材料层。
entities.relationshipEn: Ibiden is tracked in the External foundry, packaging, and substrates layer for ABF substrates, Package substrates, Organic substrates. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈

relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Directly enters critical manufacturing, memory, or packaging layers, strongly affecting capacity, yield, and delivery cadence.

entities.name: Unimicron
entities.relationship: IC 载板和 PCB 供应商，间接影响 Intel 封装、板级集成和服务器平台材料供应。
entities.relationshipZh: IC 载板和 PCB 供应商，间接影响 Intel 封装、板级集成和服务器平台材料供应。
entities.relationshipEn: Unimicron is tracked in the External foundry, packaging, and substrates layer for IC substrates, PCBs, HDI boards. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。

relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Directly enters critical manufacturing, memory, or packaging layers, strongly affecting capacity, yield, and delivery cadence.

entities.name: Shinko Electric Industries
entities.relationship: 封装基板与半导体封装材料供应链参与者；2025 年公开文件显示其 tender offer 目标包括私有化，因此这里作为供应链实体保留但不展示可交易股票链接。

listing.note: 2025 年公开文件显示 JICC-04 tender offer 以私有化为目的
listing.noteZh: 2025 年公开文件显示 JICC-04 tender offer 以私有化为目的

entities.relationshipEn: Shinko Electric Industries is tracked in the External foundry, packaging, and substrates layer for Package substrates, Semiconductor packages, Lead frames. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。

tiers.notes: Intel 部分产品会依赖外部 foundry 或封装生态；该层用于追踪供应弹性和先进封装瓶颈。
tiers.notesZh: Intel 部分产品会依赖外部 foundry 或封装生态；该层用于追踪供应弹性和先进封装瓶颈。
tiers.notesEn: Intel 部分产品会依赖外部 foundry 或封装生态；该层用于追踪供应弹性和先进封装瓶颈。

tiers.title: 晶圆、化学品、气体和消耗材料

entities.name: Shin-Etsu
entities.relationship: 硅晶圆和半导体材料供应商，处于 Intel 前道制造的上游原材料层。
entities.relationshipZh: 硅晶圆和半导体材料供应商，处于 Intel 前道制造的上游原材料层。
entities.relationshipEn: Shin-Etsu is tracked in the Wafers, chemicals, gases, and consumables layer for Silicon wafers, Photoresists, Semiconductor materials. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: SUMCO
entities.relationship: 300mm 硅晶圆供应商，晶圆质量和交期会影响 Intel 晶圆厂连续生产和良率爬坡。
entities.relationshipZh: 300mm 硅晶圆供应商，晶圆质量和交期会影响 Intel 晶圆厂连续生产和良率爬坡。
entities.relationshipEn: SUMCO is tracked in the Wafers, chemicals, gases, and consumables layer for 300mm silicon wafers, Prime wafers, Epitaxial wafers. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: JSR
entities.relationship: 光刻胶等半导体材料供应链参与者；JPX 披露其股票已于 2024 年 6 月 25 日退市，因此不作为当前上市标的展示。

listing.note: JPX 披露 JSR 于 2024-06-25 退市

relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

tiers.titleZh: 晶圆、化学品、气体和消耗材料

rawMaterials.name: 高纯硅晶圆
rawMaterials.risk: 先进节点需要高规格晶圆和严格缺陷控制，供应质量直接影响良率。
rawMaterials.riskZh: 先进节点需要高规格晶圆和严格缺陷控制，供应质量直接影响良率。
rawMaterials.riskEn: Advanced nodes require high-spec wafers and strict defect control; supply quality directly affects yield.

rawMaterials.name: 光刻胶、特种气体和湿化学品
rawMaterials.risk: 供应商集中且认证周期长，断供会影响晶圆厂连续生产。
rawMaterials.nameZh: 光刻胶、特种气体和湿化学品
rawMaterials.nameEn: Photoresists, specialty gases, and wet chemicals
rawMaterials.riskZh: 供应商集中且认证周期长，断供会影响晶圆厂连续生产。
rawMaterials.riskEn: Supplier concentration and long qualification cycles mean disruptions can affect continuous fab operations.

rawMaterials.name: 铜、ABF 树脂、陶瓷和封装材料
rawMaterials.usedIn: 先进封装、基板、互连和散热
rawMaterials.risk: 先进封装扩产会拉动高层数基板和散热材料需求。
rawMaterials.nameZh: 铜、ABF 树脂、陶瓷和封装材料
rawMaterials.nameEn: Copper, ABF resin, ceramics, and packaging materials
rawMaterials.usedInZh: 先进封装、基板、互连和散热
rawMaterials.usedInEn: Advanced packaging, substrates, interconnects, and thermal management
rawMaterials.riskZh: 先进封装扩产会拉动高层数基板和散热材料需求。
rawMaterials.riskEn: Advanced packaging expansion raises demand for high-layer-count substrates and thermal materials.

downstream.thesis: Intel is a classic midstream semiconductor company: it supplies client CPUs to OEMs, Xeon platforms to server makers and cloud/enterprise infrastructure, and is trying to turn Intel Foundry into a downstream customer-facing manufacturing service.
downstream.thesisZh: Intel 是典型中游半导体公司：向 OEM 提供客户端 CPU，向服务器厂商和云/企业基础设施提供 Xeon 平台，同时试图把 Intel Foundry 打造成面向下游客户的制造服务。
downstream.thesisEn: Intel is a classic midstream semiconductor company: it supplies client CPUs to OEMs, Xeon platforms to server makers and cloud/enterprise infrastructure, and is trying to turn Intel Foundry into a downstream customer-facing manufacturing service.

productsServicesZh: vPro 商用 PC 平台

relationshipStrength.label: 弱相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 下游需求关系有助于判断应用去向，但相关性通常弱于上游关键供给和制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 下游需求关系有助于判断应用去向，但相关性通常弱于上游关键供给和制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: The downstream demand relationship helps identify application direction, but it is usually weaker than upstream critical supply and manufacturing bottlenecks.

entities.name: Microsoft Surface
entities.relationship: Microsoft Surface is listed in Intel's commercial Core Ultra/vPro design ecosystem.
entities.relationshipZh: Microsoft Surface 被列入 Intel 商用 Core Ultra/vPro 设计生态。
entities.relationshipEn: Microsoft Surface is listed in Intel's commercial Core Ultra/vPro design ecosystem.

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 大型云或平台客户会影响需求预期，但传导链条位于采购和应用端，弱于供给瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 大型云或平台客户会影响需求预期，但传导链条位于采购和应用端，弱于供给瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Large cloud or platform customers affect demand expectations, but the transmission sits on the purchasing and application side and is weaker than supply bottlenecks.

tiers.notes: Intel discloses OEM design momentum for AI PCs and vPro; these partners convert Intel CPUs into commercial notebooks, desktops and workstations.
tiers.notesZh: Intel 披露 AI PC 与 vPro 的 OEM 设计动能；这些伙伴把 Intel CPU 转化为商用笔记本、台式机和工作站。
tiers.notesEn: Intel discloses OEM design momentum for AI PCs and vPro; these partners convert Intel CPUs into commercial notebooks, desktops and workstations.

tiers.title: Foundry customers

entities.name: Microsoft

entities.relationshipEn: Intel states Microsoft chose a chip design it plans to produce on Intel 18A.

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关

tiers.notes: Intel Foundry is the clearest example of Intel moving from an internal-product company into a supplier for other chip designers.

news.title: Postcard from Computex 2026: New Intel® Core™ Series 3 laptops for Everyday Creation and All-day Productivity
news.summary: TAIPEI, Taiwan — One trend stood out across the Computex 2026 show floor: users want laptops that can keep up with their day without constantly searching for a charger.Intel showcased six new thin-and-light laptop designs powered by the new Intel® C
news.impact: 自动抓取条目，需要人工复核业务影响。
news.titleZh: Computex 2026 现场：Intel Core Series 3 笔记本面向日常创作与全天生产力
news.titleEn: Postcard from Computex 2026: Intel Core Series 3 laptops for everyday creation and all-day productivity
news.summaryZh: Intel 展示搭载新款 Core Series 3 的轻薄笔记本设计，强调续航、日常创作和生产力体验。
news.summaryEn: Intel showcased thin-and-light laptop designs powered by Core Series 3, emphasizing battery life, everyday creation, and productivity.
news.impactZh: 该消息偏客户端产品线更新，影响取决于 OEM 设计落地、AI PC 需求和渠道销售。
news.impactEn: This is a client-product update; impact depends on OEM design wins, AI PC demand, and channel sell-through.

news.title: Intel Introduces Ethernet E835 Controllers and Network Adapters for Cloud, Edge and Enterprise Data Center Infrastructure
news.summary: Intel announced the launch of the Intel Ethernet E835 Controllers and Network Adapters, the latest addition to its 800 Series portfolio. Designed to meet the bandwidth and scalability demands of high-density environments across Data Center, Enterprise, AI and
news.impact: 自动抓取条目，需要人工复核业务影响。
news.titleZh: Intel 推出面向云、边缘和企业数据中心的 Ethernet E835 控制器与网卡
news.titleEn: Intel introduces Ethernet E835 controllers and network adapters for cloud, edge, and enterprise data centers
news.summaryZh: Intel 发布 Ethernet E835 控制器和网卡，面向高密度数据中心、企业、边缘和 AI 网络需求。
news.summaryEn: Intel launched Ethernet E835 controllers and network adapters for high-density data center, enterprise, edge, and AI networking needs.
news.impactZh: 该消息强化网络和数据中心平台组合，但收入转化取决于客户认证、服务器平台导入和采购周期。
news.impactEn: The item strengthens Intel's networking and data center platform portfolio, while revenue conversion depends on customer qualification, platform adoption, and procurement cycles.

news.title: Intel 在 Computex 2026 发布 AI 创新
news.summary: Intel 公布面向推理和 agentic 工作负载的 rackscale AI 基础设施、Xeon 6+、产业合作和 Series 3 处理器动向。
news.impact: 强化 CPU 在 AI 推理和边缘场景中的定位，但商业转化取决于生态伙伴和客户部署速度。
news.titleZh: Intel 在 Computex 2026 发布 AI 创新
news.titleEn: Intel announces AI innovations at Computex 2026
news.summaryZh: Intel 公布面向推理和 agentic 工作负载的 rackscale AI 基础设施、Xeon 6+、产业合作和 Series 3 处理器动向。
news.summaryEn: Intel announced rack-scale AI infrastructure for inference and agentic workloads, Xeon 6+, ecosystem partnerships, and Series 3 processor updates.
news.impactZh: 强化 CPU 在 AI 推理和边缘场景中的定位，但商业转化取决于生态伙伴和客户部署速度。
news.impactEn: This reinforces CPUs in AI inference and edge workloads, while monetization depends on ecosystem partners and customer deployment pace.

news.title: Computex 2026: An Intelligent World Built on Silicon

news.impact: 自动抓取条目，需要人工复核业务影响。
news.titleZh: Computex 2026：建立在硅之上的智能世界
news.titleEn: Computex 2026: An intelligent world built on silicon
news.summaryZh: Intel 在 Computex 主题演讲中强调 x86、AI、客户端和数据中心平台在智能计算中的作用。

news.title: Intel 发布 2026 第一季度业绩
news.summary: Q1 收入 136 亿美元，同比增长 7%；non-GAAP EPS 为 0.29 美元；Q2 指引收入区间为 138 亿至 148 亿美元。
news.impact: 供给改善和 CPU 需求支撑业绩，但 GAAP 亏损、重组费用和 foundry 投入仍需跟踪。
news.titleZh: Intel 发布 2026 年第一季度业绩
news.summaryZh: Q1 收入 136 亿美元，同比增长 7%；non-GAAP EPS 为 0.29 美元；Q2 指引收入区间为 138 亿至 148 亿美元。
news.summaryEn: Q1 revenue was $13.6 billion, up 7% year over year; non-GAAP EPS was $0.29; Q2 revenue guidance was $13.8 billion to $14.8 billion.
news.impactZh: 供给改善和 CPU 需求支撑业绩，但 GAAP 亏损、重组费用和 foundry 投入仍需跟踪。
news.impactEn: Supply improvement and CPU demand supported results, but GAAP losses, restructuring charges, and foundry spending still need tracking.

news.title: Intel 发布 2025 全年业绩
news.summary: FY2025 收入 529 亿美元，与 2024 年大体持平；Intel Products 收入 491 亿美元，Intel Foundry 收入 178 亿美元。
news.impact: 公司处于修复与重构阶段，分部重组、Altera 出表和制造资产效率是分析重点。
news.titleZh: Intel 发布 2025 年全年业绩
news.summaryZh: FY2025 收入 529 亿美元，与 2024 年大体持平；Intel Products 收入 491 亿美元，Intel Foundry 收入 178 亿美元。
news.summaryEn: FY2025 revenue was $52.9 billion, roughly flat with 2024; Intel Products revenue was $49.1 billion and Intel Foundry revenue was $17.8 billion.
news.impactZh: 公司处于修复与重构阶段，分部重组、Altera 出表和制造资产效率是分析重点。
news.impactEn: The company is in a repair-and-rebuild phase; segment restructuring, Altera deconsolidation, and manufacturing asset efficiency are key.

themeExposure.rationale: 公司同时处于计算芯片和制造产能端，相关性强于单纯下游采购方，但其 AI GPU 生态不是当前最核心瓶颈。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: 公司同时处于计算芯片和制造产能端，相关性强于单纯下游采购方，但其 AI GPU 生态不是当前最核心瓶颈。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: The company spans compute chips and manufacturing capacity, stronger than a pure downstream buyer, though its AI GPU ecosystem is not the current central bottleneck.
